title: Sphenomeris microphylla
taxonomy: Sphenomeris microphylla belongs to the family Nolinaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the order Asparagales. The plant is native to China. The classification of Sphenomeris microphylla is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Asparagales, family Nolinaceae, genus Sphenomeris. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships.

intro: Sphenomeris microphylla, also known as the "Chinese club moss," is a type of lycopod that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to Asia.
